content: give me summary of this file.

This document describes the development of an ESP32-Based Portable Thermal Monitoring & Imaging System. The system uses an infrared sensor to capture thermal data, which is then processed by the ESP32 and displayed on a TFT screen as a heatmap. The system has several applications, including temperature monitoring, human presence detection, and educational demonstrations. However, it has limitations, such as low spatial resolution and limited accuracy compared to commercial systems. The document concludes that the system is a compact and affordable alternative to commercial thermal cameras and suggests future improvements, including higher-resolution sensors and wireless visualization.
